metadata.districtModel: five sections; five district slots per section; D13 is the seat of power

cityDNA.coreFantasy: A Indigenous American / Plains city where Turquoise Ancestor Mesa of the Four Winds, Manor Court Beacon, Carved Totems Sovereign Registry Court, and the five-section district spine turn local identity into functional civic space.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Awanate should feel immediately identifiable through exact landmarks and materials, not through generic fantasy-city shorthand.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Awanate organizes power through Carved Totems Sovereign Registry Court, public response through Manor Court Beacon, civic memory through Turquoise Ancestor Mesa of the Four Winds, and daily life through S1 High Residential Civic Hall, S2 Arena / Training Civic Hall, S3 Records / Archives Hall, S4 Agricultural Terraces Civic Hall, S5 Granary / Food Market Civic Hall.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Cedar, Hide, Rammed Earth, Bone, Turquoise Inlay, Dry Stone Paving, Civic Terraces, Civic Blue Illumination, Oath Seals, Ancestral Spirits, and exact anchors including Carved Totems Sovereign Registry Court, Manor Court Beacon, Turquoise Ancestor Mesa of the Four Winds, Grain Hall, Training Arena, Terrace Granary, High Residential Civic Hall, Hanging Gardens Monument, Salon Pavilion Nook, Arena / Training Civic Hall.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: A Indigenous American / Plains civic culture where architecture, public obligations, roads, landmark approaches, and everyday work must all read as part of the same civilization.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: The city symbol system is built from exact names and visible functions: Turquoise Ancestor Mesa of the Four Winds, Manor Court Beacon, Carved Totems Sovereign Registry Court, and section anchors such as High Residential Civic Hall, Arena / Training Civic Hall, Records / Archives Hall, Agricultural Terraces Civic Hall, Granary / Food Market Civic Hall.

Do not replace exact anchor names with generic summaries.
Do not invent missing street-section landmarks when a street source is absent.

Every district asset should remain usable for narrative scenes, tactical board dioramas, and city map backgrounds.
